primary_flags_index.summary: Cat-allergy/asthma safety allegation; Melissa refuses Christmas visit citing Eli's cat; 'You've had 11 months to get rid of that damn cat' — manufactured safety pretext. First ARC-RF14-001 signal.
Car unattended allegation (Apr 22-28, 2023) — Melissa claims Eli left Olivia unattended in car as safety allegation.
Injury relay + 'always getting hurt by you' (May 10, 2023) — Melissa relays alleged physical harm from Eli via Olivia; unsubstantiated.
Vaping device early observation (Jul 30, 2023) — Eli's first genuine safety observation re vaping/device presence. First ARC-RF14-002 signal.

Cat-allergy lawyer letter escalation (Mar 31, 2024) — 'I had to have my lawyer send you a letter to get you to stop subjecting her to them.' Manufactured medical safety allegation weaponized with legal threat.
Allergy medication reminder (Jun 9, 2024) — Eli: 'Might be good idea to make sure she has allergy meds.' Genuine medical compliance observation per ADD-004.
Milo water balloon bruises (Jun 17, 2024) — Melissa reports Olivia has bruises from water balloon fight with Milo, framed in hostile context as safety allegation.
Allergy medication ragweed alert (Aug 4, 2024) — Eli: 'double up in allergy meds today ragweed is very high.' Genuine medical compliance documentation. ARC-RF14-002 promoted to ACTIVE.
Bike safety gear dispute (Sep 6, 2024) — Melissa disputes Eli's safety gear requirements for Olivia when biking.
Skateboard unsafe trucks (Sep 8, 2024) — Eli discovers and fixes Olivia's skateboard unsafe hardware. Genuine safety observation and remediation.
Choking/arm-twisting harm relay (Sep 15, 2024) — Melissa relays alleged physical harm by Eli (choking, arm-twisting) via Olivia. Unsubstantiated harm relay, manufactured safety allegation.
Melatonin 'drugging' accusation (Oct 3, 2024) — Melissa accuses Eli of 'drugging' Olivia with melatonin. ARC-RF14-001 promoted to ACTIVE at this signal.
Olivia self-harm (Feb 15, 2025) — Olivia hitting herself; Melissa confirms: 'You knew she used to do that.' Escalated to Sev-2 given self-harm behavior history confirmed by both parents.
Skateboard fall without safety gear at Melissa's (Mar 13, 2025) — Eli: 'Surprised she wasn't wearing any pads or safety gear.' Genuine safety compliance concern at Melissa's household.

Melissa Percocet disclosure (Jul 19, 2025) — 'I'm getting my prescriptions now but I'm going to take a Percocet and sleep'; 'I'm taking medicine that I'm not allowed to drive a vehicle or make legal decisions while on.' Narcotic use while caregiving responsibility active.

Gary first documented overnight (Aug 18, 2025) — 'Sunday morning may be better if I have Gary over Saturday night' + 'We like the overnights.' Gary has DV arrest history (05/23/2023, dismissed 09/19/2023). Per ADD-003.

Homicide investigation at Melissa's neighborhood (Sep 18, 2025) — 'They breached the house / Crime scene unit is on site / The husband has been arrested and being detained.' Olivia present during active homicide investigation; Melissa's friend (Amelia's mother) died (possibly murdered, per Oct 2 follow-up).

Gary parenting plan formal challenge (Nov 5, 2025) — Eli: 'I don't think Gary or whoever is coming over qualifies as one of the exceptions in our parenting plan... I don't think having Gary around her is wise.' First formal invocation of 9-month protective clause.

Gary visit post-formal-challenge (Feb 18, 2026) — 'We're getting ready to go to Gary's for a bit.' Melissa continues Gary contact with Olivia despite Eli's Nov 2025 formal parenting plan challenge. DV history applies per ADD-003.

Melissa seizure while responsible for Olivia (Feb 27, 2026) — 'I had a seizure this morning and wasn't feeling well enough to get Olivia up and ready... I'm still feeling pretty rough.' Caregiver medical incapacitation; vision impairment noted; no backup care evident.

ARC-RF14-001.name: Safety Allegation Pattern
ARC-RF14-001.trajectory: CANDIDATE (B-001) → WATCHING (S-000, B-004, Dec 2022) → ACTIVE (S-010/S-011, B-019, Oct 2024)
ARC-RF14-001.description: Melissa's manufactured false safety allegations against Eli — 8 documented instances from Dec 2022 through Oct 2024. All compound with RF-15 (false allegation pattern). Pattern includes cat-allergy weaponization, harm relay events, melatonin accusation, bike safety weaponization. Distinct from ARC-RF14-002 genuine safety observations.

ARC-RF14-002.name: Genuine Safety Documentation
ARC-RF14-002.trajectory: CANDIDATE (B-001) → WATCHING (S-003, B-009, Jul 2023) → ACTIVE (S-007, B-017, Aug 2024)
ARC-RF14-002.description: Legitimate bi-directional genuine safety observations. Received direction: Melissa household indicators (vaping, Percocet use, Gary DV history, seizure, homicide event at neighborhood, self-harm, inadequate safety gear). Sent direction: Eli's appropriate welfare documentation (allergy meds compliance, skateboard safety remediation, Gary formal challenge). Olivia self-harm (S-012) is the only Sev-2 event.
key_signals: S-013 (skateboard fall no safety gear at Melissa's)

signal_direction_summary.note: Dominant Received direction confirms Melissa household is the primary genuine safety concern source. Eli's Sent-direction signals are appropriate parenting welfare observations (allergy meds, skateboard repair, Gary formal challenge) — not RF-14 concerns about Eli. Both arcs are internally consistent with this direction pattern.

key_calibration_decisions: ADD-001: All known RF-15 false allegations (alcoholism accusation ROW-15498, vaping/asthma B-025/B-026, pinching relay, Abby drunk allegation) → RF-15 primary, RF-14 peripheral only. Applied consistently across all batches.
ADD-002: Feb 2026 bilateral argument (ROW-15098-15103) → RF-11 primary, RF-14 peripheral mitigated Sev-1. Not RF-14 primary.
ADD-003: Gary DV arrest history (05/23/2023, dismissed 09/19/2023) applied to S-015 (Gary documented overnight) and S-018 (Gary post-challenge visit). Sev-1 genuine safety concern.
ADD-004: Allergy medication non-compliance confirmed ongoing — applied to S-005 and S-007.
ADD-007: Pre-2023 manufactured safety allegations — ARC-RF14-001 WATCHING correctly triggered at S-000 (Dec 2022 cat-allergy Christmas refusal).
Bruise welfare check (B-031 ROW-15590-15597): NOT flagged RF-14. RF-15 Category D DARVO. Eli's welfare check is appropriate parenting behavior — explicitly not an RF-14 flag per ADD-001.
synthesis_notes: The ARC-RF14-001/ARC-RF14-002 distinction is the central classification contribution of RF-14. The same fact pattern (safety language) means entirely different things in Received vs. Sent direction, and distinguishing manufactured false allegations (RF-15 compound) from genuine welfare concerns is the core analytical value.

Gary's presence arc (S-015 Aug 2025 first documented overnight → S-017 Nov 2025 formal challenge → S-018 Feb 2026 post-challenge continuation) is a compound RF-14/RF-02 safety narrative worth flagging for synthesis.

Melissa's medical/substance disclosures cluster in late 2025 - early 2026: Percocet Jul 2025 (S-014) and seizure Feb 2026 (S-019) — two separate caregiver incapacitation events within 7 months. Escalating pattern in ARC-RF14-002.

Olivia self-harm (S-012, Sev-2, Feb 2025) is the only elevated-severity primary flag in RF-14. Both parents acknowledge this. Synthesis should treat as genuine welfare concern requiring cross-pass analysis (RF-09 and RF-11 intersections possible).

ARC-RF14-001 effectively closed after B-019 (Oct 2024) — no new manufactured safety allegations in 2025-2026. The pattern shifted from outright false allegations to documentation of genuine Melissa household concerns.
